author: Jorge Asenjo
name: SP8192 #1855 Base + Asymmetric Logit Rescale
blurb: PR #1855 stack (LQER asym int4 + Sparse Attn Gate + BOS-Fixed SmearGate + 9-hparam greedy) with two-scale tanh logit rescale (modded-nanogpt #181) on the eval path. Two learned softcap scalars (positive/negative tail) trained inside Phased TTT. 3-seed mean val_bpb 1.06577.
